title: Christmas Taba Squishy, 4PCS Christmas Stocking Fillers for Kids and Adults Squishy Toys Taba Fufu Squishies Fidget Toys, Xmas Gifts Kawaii Mochi Squeeze Toy Eve Box Fillers
features: 【Fun Christmas Squishies Set】This taba squishy fidget set includes a santa, a snowman, a Christmas reindeer and a gingerbread man. Each squishy toy is meticulously crafted—ideal for stress relief, display, or as collectible squishies.

【Fidget and Stress Relief Toys】Squeeze and squish these squishies toy to ease anxiety, help develop coordination and focus skills. Perfect as fidget toys for adults seeking sensory soothing or stimulation.

【Safe & Durable Material】Made with high-quality and stretch-resistant materials, you can squish, squeeze, stretch, or press them over and over, and they always bounce back. Each style comes sealed in a transparent bag for cleanliness.

【Portable and On-the-Go Fun】Designed to fit perfectly in your hand, bag or pocket. Lightweight and small yet satisfyingly squishy, they’re ideal for play anywhere. Take your taba squishy kit with you and turn any moment into a calming, fun.

【Perfect Christmas Gift】These squishy toys perfect for holiday play during Christmas parties or as a unique stocking stuffer, can be used as party favours, playful desk companions or classroom prizes. These toys bring holiday spirit to both home and office.
description: Product description Features: The combination of cute Taba squishy toys design, satisfying squishiness, and stress-relieving properties makes them a hit among both adults. Four unique designs, expertly crafted for collecting and decor. Bag is easy to play and store, not easy to lose and dirty toys. Made from Child-safe and durable material. With a gentle press squeeze, stretch, it immediately rebounds. This fidget toy for is designed to be pocket-sized and lightweight, stress relief—squeezable fun to go, anytime, anywhere. Light up your home with this kawaii squishy toy. Add character and Christmas atmosphere to your desk. Specifications: Material: TPR Color: Multi-color Theme: Christmas Dimensions: Shown as picture Style: Santa Claus, Snowman, Reindeer, Gingerbread Man Package includes: 4 * Different Styles Taba Squishy Toys Notes: 1.Please allow slight dimensional deviations due to manual measurements. 2.Due to the different display and lighting effects, the actual colour of the item may differ slightly from the colour shown in the picture. Directions Squeeze, squish, stretch, or press the toys for stress relief or entertainment. Safety Warning NO See more
